Table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_LINK

Card of table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_LINK

Name

FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_LINK

Code

FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_LINK

DBMS

Snowflake


Description of the table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_LINK

No RLS as this table is a dictionary

Historization: SCD1

Load type: DELTA

 

VALID_FROM - 1900-01-01 00:00:00

 

SELECT

MD5(ATLAN_PHYSICAL_ASSET_GUID_BK+VALID_FROM),

MD5(ATLAN_ASSET_LINK_ID_BK+VALID_FROM)

 

(

SELECT A. GUID AS ATLAN_PHYSICAL_ASSET_GUID_BK,

A.LINK as ATLAN_ASSET_LINK_ID_BK

 

(SELECT DISTINCT

GUID,

TRIM(SPLIT.VALUE) AS LINK

FROM (

SELECT DISTINCT GUID, LINKS

FROM T_ATLAN_EXPORT_PHYSICAL_ASSETS

WHERE LINKS IS NOT NULL

) AS BASE,

LATERAL SPLIT_TO_TABLE(BASE.LINKS, ',') AS SPLIT

WHERE TRIM(SPLIT.VALUE) != ''

ORDER BY GUID, LINK) A


Check constraint name of the table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_LINK

CKT_FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_LINK


Server validation rule of the table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_LINK

%RULES%


Code preview of the table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_LINK

drop table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_LINK cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_LINK
--==============================================================
create or replace table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_LINK (
DIM_PHYSICAL_ASSET_KEY VARCHAR(32) not null,
DIM_ASSET_LINK_KEY VARCHAR(32) not null,
constraint PK_FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_LINK primary key (DIM_PHYSICAL_ASSET_KEY, DIM_ASSET_LINK_KEY)
not enforced
);

alter table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_LINK set comment = 'Factless table having Different LINKS associated with physical assets';

comment on column FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_LINK.DIM_PHYSICAL_ASSET_KEY is
'dimensional Key adding unique identifier';

comment on column FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_LINK.DIM_ASSET_LINK_KEY is
'artificially generated unique identifier for each group owner';
